$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for investigation-agent responses (issue #436, sdlc fix). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: InvestigationAgentResponse
description: Structured fix plan returned by the investigation agent dispatched by `sdlc fix`.

root_cause.description: One-line description of the issue's root cause (not just symptoms).

complexity.description: Assessed complexity of the fix; HIGH escalates build/review/bugfix to opus (Story 27.1-001).

fix_approach.description: 1-2 sentence description of the fix strategy.

files_to_modify.description: Paths the fix is expected to touch.

investigation_status.description: READY: root cause found, proceed to build. BLOCKED: needs a human decision.
